description_long: A muscular adult male figure stands with arms outstretched, displaying a fierce and intimidating presence. His right arm is encased in a large, monstrous, red claw-like gauntlet, while his left hand is bare. He wears rugged, battle-worn pants secured with a belt, and tall boots that reach just below the knee. A thick strap crosses his bare, tattooed torso, supporting a set of pouches and a large animal skull attached at his left hip. His head is shaved on the sides with a long braided mohawk, and he sports a thick beard and a stern expression. A menacing battle axe with a skull motif floats nearby, suggesting he is a warrior or barbarian.
description: A muscular, tattooed man with a monstrous gauntlet, battle gear, and a fierce expression, equipped with a skull-adorned axe and rugged accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the man's muscular build, monstrous right arm gauntlet, bare chest with tattoos, and fierce facial expression.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the braided mohawk, the monstrous gauntlet, and the animal skull hanging from his belt.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the full length of the back strap, tattooed back, and pouches attached to his belt.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the axe, the animal skull, and the details of the gauntlet and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: battle-worn pants with a belt, cross-body strap, tall boots, and utility pouches
attribute_hairstyle: long braided mohawk with shaved sides
